title: oreostemma alpigenum var. haydenii
intro: Oreostemma alpigenum var. haydenii, also known as Hayden's oreostemma, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the western United States. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hayden's oreostemma include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. This plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is typically consumed in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
